title: ACG Surnames by Romaji — Clustered by Reading
description: The 34,835 matched character names re-clustered by romaji (Hepburn) reading of the surname. Same reading may span multiple kanji variants (同音異姓), and a single kanji may split across multiple readings (同姓異音).
